Now based on the Asc Cp I can give a whole lot of
prediction which I am postponing to another time. I am also
sure that you are born in the 2nd half ofCp, since 3.30- 4.30
it is Cp first half and 4.30 to 5.30 it is Cp 2nd half. The people
born in I st half (1st Hora) of Cp does not have much interest
in girls and you are not of that type. That means your Asc
falls between 15° and 30° ofCp.
If we consider the Drekkana (1/3 rd of a Sign), we can
further reduce the BT window. As per Saravali a person born
in the 3rd Drekkana of Cp is an outspoken man, and lives
abroad away from his father, and undergoes troubles due to

that life abroad. It suits you well. That means the BT win

Ra in 3rd should give economic troubles.
